evals.prompt: Melhora as skills. Logs existem com 3 observacoes de ambiguous_instruction em data-access-api e 2 gaps de i18n no orchestration-log.
evals.expected_output: Full report presented with IMPROVE section for data-access-api and CREATE section for i18n stub. User can respond with batch like '1A 2D'. Positive-only skills appear in NO ACTION NEEDED section.
assertions: all log files are read before building the report
suggestions-history.jsonl is read to filter previously decided suggestions
report is presented in the exact format with IMPROVEMENTS, NEW SKILLS, NO ACTION NEEDED sections
data-access-api appears in IMPROVEMENTS section with exact current and proposed text
i18n appears in NEW SKILLS TO CREATE section with tasks that triggered it
user can respond with batch notation like 1A 2D
report shows total observation count and deferred count from last session

evals.prompt: Melhora as skills. Uma sugestao foi rejeitada anteriormente. observations_since_rejection atual eh 7 — abaixo do threshold de 10.
evals.expected_output: Skill reads suggestions-history.jsonl, finds rejected suggestion with observations_since_rejection 7 which is below threshold 10, suppresses it completely. It does not appear anywhere in the report.
assertions: suggestions-history.jsonl is read before building report
rejected suggestion with observations_since_rejection below 10 does not appear in main report
rejected suggestion does not appear in any section including PREVIOUSLY REJECTED
other valid suggestions are presented normally
no mention of the suppressed suggestion anywhere in the output

evals.prompt: Melhora as skills. Usuario responde 1A para aprovar o IMPROVE de data-access-api.
evals.expected_output: Skill opens data-access-api SKILL.md, applies exactly the proposed change, shows before/after diff, deletes contributing observations from log, writes approved status to suggestions-history.jsonl. Reports summary.
assertions: exact proposed change text is applied to data-access-api SKILL.md — no additional modifications
before and after diff is shown to user
contributing observations are deleted from skill-observations.jsonl
suggestions-history.jsonl entry written with status approved
summary reports how many improvements applied stubs created rejected deferred
log cleanup runs after all decisions — entries older than 30 days removed from stack-detector-log

evals.prompt: Melhora as skills. Usuario responde 2A para aprovar o CREATE de i18n-patterns.
evals.expected_output: Skill creates stub SKILL.md at .opencode/skills/i18n-patterns/SKILL.md with suggested coverage, deletes contributing gap entries from log, confirms stub creation with next step instruction.
assertions: stub file is created at .opencode/skills/i18n-patterns/SKILL.md
stub contains name frontmatter, status stub, and suggested coverage list from the CREATE suggestion
stub instructs user to develop fully using skill-creator
gap entries that triggered this CREATE are deleted from orchestration-log.jsonl
confirmation message tells user to use skill-creator to develop the stub
summary reflects Y stubs created

evals.prompt: Melhora as skills. Diretorio de logs nao existe ainda.
evals.expected_output: Skill detects missing logs directory, reports clearly that there is nothing to review yet and more usage is needed. Exits cleanly without error or empty report.
assertions: skill checks for logs directory before attempting to read files
missing logs are reported as expected state not as an error
user is told the system needs more usage before improvements can be suggested
skill exits cleanly with no empty report sections shown
no suggestions-history.jsonl modification occurs
